gap.counter_hook: Honest recommendations — no pressure, no unnecessary upsells or replacements.
evidence:
I appreciate their honest feedback of my unit.  One supplier wanted to replace parts This company advises against it as it would not impact the performance of my unit.

Update: Despite them advising me to not make any changes to my AC unit

Very friendly reply and fast action from the company. Also the guy, Steve, was very nice. The service and cleaning of the glogged drain did cost USD 231 and thus in the high end IMO. Also it was recommended to change the capacitor for at pr

Beware! BAD EXPERIENCE!  Our AC stopped, we called Quality, they came and immediately said the compressor was shot and we needed a new AC. (charged $99.0 but did nothing) We live in condo, just so happens another AC company was in the build

suggested_action: Review Counter-Positioning: 'Quality Air Conditioning Company' is repeatedly criticized for upsell pressure (3 negative reviews). Surface the counter-signal on the client's pages + FAQs: "Honest recommendations — no pressure, no unnecessary upsells or replacements." (also add to business_entity.md so AI engines match safety/intent queries to the client).
note: Human reviews + approves the positioning copy before any publish work order issues.
